name: IIM Visakhapatnam – Manager, Research Associate – 3 Posts
qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, Any Post Graduate, MBA/PGDM

basic_details.job_title: IIM Visakhapatnam Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Manager, Research Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam (IIM Visakhapatnam) Recruitment 2026 for 3 posts of Manager, Research Associate, CEESP. Candidates with any Bachelor's degree, MBA, Post-Graduate degre Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIM Visakhapatnam official website iimv.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree for both positions. Post-Graduate degree is preferable for Manager and Research Associate. Specific disciplines are mentioned for preferable qualifications.

salary_details.pay_scale: Manager: Up to ₹ 1,00,000 per month. Research Associate: Up to ₹ 41,000 per month.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Visakhapatnam to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
